## Configuration

<DocCardList items={[{"type":"link","href":"error-handling","label":"Error handling","description":"Unified error types surfaced by every form hook and error-handling surface in the SDK."},{"type":"link","href":"events","label":"Events","description":"Every SDK component exposes an `onEvent` callback that fires when the user takes an action or completes a step."},{"type":"link","href":"http-interceptors","label":"HTTP interceptors","description":"Low-level request/response interceptors for customizing HTTP behaviour across the SDK."},{"type":"link","href":"observability","label":"Observability","description":"Error-tracking and performance-metric hooks for integrating the SDK with tools like Sentry or Datadog."},{"type":"link","href":"providers","label":"Providers","description":"The two top-level providers that connect the SDK to your React tree."},{"type":"link","href":"theme-variables","label":"Theme variables","description":"These design tokens control the visual appearance of all components and UX within the SDK."},{"type":"link","href":"Translations/","label":"Translations","description":"Per-namespace SDK i18n keys, each namespace browsable as its own reference (e.g. [Translations.CompanyAddresses](Translations/index.md#companyaddresses)) with every key's English default.
